title: Changes in Hospital Quality Associated with Hospital Value-Based Purchasing
source: U-Michigan CEHR, School of Public Health

L2: Visual abstract on hospital quality changes from value-based purchasing programs
Evaluation of CMS Hospital Value-Based Purchasing program effectiveness
L3: U-Michigan CEHR visual abstract examining changes in hospital quality associated with the Hospital Value-Based Purchasing (HVBP) program. Evaluates whether CMS payment incentives tied to quality metrics drive meaningful improvements in hospital care.
